classes.name: single representative run
classes.intended_scale: one case-scoped representative run per selected family

classes.name: short repeated batch
classes.intent: small bounded repeat batch for selected family profiles
classes.intended_scale: 2 short case-scoped batch runs with fresh basetemp/out_root

classes.name: bounded soak burst
classes.intent: short same-host burst for selected low-cost representative families
classes.intended_scale: 3 brief same-host bursts using low-cost profiles only, still bounded and case-isolated
too_large_for_phase: cloud autoscaling or installation packaging validation
